subcodes.first_line: O friends! Due to lack of time, I write briefly that Jinab-i-Aqa Hasan, son of Aqa Husaynquli [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران از عدم فرصت مختصر مرقوم میشود جناب آقا حسن ابن آقا حسینقلی را بجان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
